phase: Phase 15I.2C — DRE Workbook Formula Parity and Finance Registry Correction

enrollmentDocumentation.declarationNote: Neither value is declared authoritative. Engine: t1_g3/intermediario scenario (openingPackageOccupancySourceData.ts). PnL workbook: Phase 13B baseline (PNL_FORMULA_PARITY_SOURCE_DATA, ~246 learners; scenario not mapped to engine). Finance and Board must confirm the authoritative baseline and equivalent-scenario mapping.

openItems.label: Outras Receitas — annual adjustment (reajuste_despesas) index name and signed source
openItems.currentEngineBehavior: outras_receitas = outrasReceitasRatio × numero_de_alunos — reajuste term omitted; engine discloses via outrasReceitasReajusteNote. Formula mechanics confirmed from PnL workbook (C233 = ($Y233/$Y$221)*(1+C$9)*C$221); direct row-9 annual values not yet extracted as a committed source record.
openItems.sourceProvenance: Formula structure: PnL workbook row 233 (confirmed Phase 12I/12K). Direct row-9 (reajuste_despesas) extraction: not available in any committed source file. Branch B determination: Phase 15I.2C.
openItems.financeAsk: Confirm the index name for reajuste_despesas (C$9, PnL row 9) and provide a signed source reference. The formula structure (C233 = (Y233/Y221)*(1+C9)*C221) is already confirmed — only the economic index name and signed reference are needed.

openItems.label: Tuition base rates — source provenance
openItems.currentEngineBehavior: BP1 2028: EY R$91,390 / LS R$111,670 / MS R$122,419 / HS R$141,469 (screenshot_transcription_based, tuitionSourceData.ts, 2026-06-02)
openItems.sourceProvenance: screenshot_transcription_based; not a Finance-signed xlsx workbook
openItems.financeAsk: Confirm that the transcribed values match Finance-approved values and provide signed xlsx as official source.

openItems.label: Discount schedule — formal sign-off
openItems.sourceProvenance: Verbal/documented source: Head of Finance; not a Finance-signed workbook
openItems.financeAsk: Provide signed document confirming the existing discount schedule. No formula change required — provenance sign-off only.

openItems.label: 2028 enrollment baseline — engine vs PnL workbook scenario mapping
openItems.currentEngineBehavior: Engine canonical fixture: 228 learners (t1_g3/intermediario/bp1_division_differentiated/balanced_experience). PnL workbook baseline: ~246 learners (Phase 13B, PNL_FORMULA_PARITY_SOURCE_DATA). Neither is declared authoritative. Difference reflects scenario configuration mismatch, not engine error.
openItems.sourceProvenance: Engine: openingPackageOccupancySourceData.ts (t1_g3/intermediario); Workbook: PNL_FORMULA_PARITY_SOURCE_DATA (~246 learners, Phase 13B)
openItems.financeAsk: Identify which engine scenario configuration (opening package + occupancy) corresponds to the PnL workbook baseline. This is a scenario-mapping question, not a formula dispute.

openItems.label: Instructional-capacity / FOPAG payroll synchronization
openItems.currentEngineBehavior: Both models are implemented. Instructional-capacity planning model (Phase 15H.2): MS 9 educators, HS 11 educators, combined pool 20 (secondaryEducatorCapacityModel.ts). FOPAG payroll adapter: implemented with separate current assumptions (fopagEngine.ts + orgDesignPayrollActivation.ts). Both implemented; assumptions not yet formally reconciled. Synchronization is pending a dedicated future phase.
openItems.sourceProvenance: Instructional model: secondaryEducatorCapacityModel.ts (Phase 15H.2); Payroll: fopagEngine.ts + orgDesignPayrollActivation.ts
openItems.financeAsk: Finance and Academic must jointly confirm whether the FOPAG/instructional sync can proceed as a future dedicated phase, or whether any assumption must be resolved before Finance closure.

resolvedItems.label: Descontos Método de Assinatura — formula base relationship
resolvedItems.resolution: Formula base corrected from receita_de_ensino_liquida to receitas_com_ensino_regular. PnL workbook: C230 = −C$13 × C225 where C225 = receitas_com_ensino_regular. Confirmed in dreRevenueDriverSourceData.ts Phase 12I/12K extraction. Engine correction applied in Phase 15I.2C.
resolvedItems.engineChange: dreEngine.ts line 121: base changed from receita_de_ensino_liquida to receitas_com_ensino_regular
resolvedItems.remainingProvenance: Formula closure complete. Provenance open: Finance signed xlsx not yet received (tracked under F03/F04). Not a Finance formula question.
